arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news latest as PSR position explained and Morgan Rogers repeat required
arts.sum: Aston Villa are preparing to strengthen Unai Emery's squad next month with the January transfer window opening in less than three weeks' time. It has enticingly set up the Christmas period for Villa and Unai Emery, who has worked to bed in the new signings like Amadou Onana and Ian Maatsen over the course of the season, while also regaining Boubacar Kamara, Tyrone Mings and Emi Buendia from long-term injuries.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa youngster to be ‘low-cost opportunity’ for clubs – Big interest from Germany and Italy
arts.sum: Aston Villa signed Rory Wilson from Rangers in the summer 2022 window. Since then, he’s only grown in stature at the Birmingham club. He scored 16 times in 13 U18s Premier League games last season, leading to him becoming part of the club’s U21s side. He already has one goal in the Premier League 2 The post Aston Villa youngster to be ‘low-cost opportunity’ for clubs – Big interest from Germany and Italy appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'They wouldn't be sitting in fifth': Paul Merson makes bizarre Nottingham Forest claim in Aston Villa prediction
Morgan Rogers must watch his step as Aston Villa near Premier League deadline
arts.sum: Premier League players receive a one-match ban if they accumulate five yellow cards in a campaign up until the 19th league game. Rogers and Tielemans are the only outfield players who have started all of Villa's 21 matches in the Premier League and Champions League this term.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo says what he really thinks about Unai Emery and Aston Villa
arts.sum: Villa are a very good team, with the way they manage the game, their possession, the way they defend and the way they use the talent of their players. It has been a big challenge for them, playing in the Champions League a few days ago.

arts.ttl: How to watch Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa, TV and live stream details
arts.sum: Villa have maintained expectations that they would push for a second top four finish in a row, sitting sixth in the league prior to the Forest clash. It is fifth place against sixth this weekend as Unai Emery's Aston Villa travel to the East Midlands to face Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man United players have 'huge belief' in Andre Onana despite his latest blunder, claims Bruno Fernandes... after he backed up Nottingham Forest howler by gifting Viktoria Plzen a goal
arts.sum: This time, away to Viktoria Plzen, Man United No 1 Andre Onana completely miscalculated a pass out from the back to Matthjis de Ligt, allowing the Czech side to nip in and tap into an empty net.

arts.ttl: 'I'm told': Journalist shares what he's heard about Nottingham Forest's January plans and Yuri Alberto
'I didn't like': Nathan Tyson thinks 'unbelievable' Nottingham Forest star was treated badly by Steve Cooper
Aston Villa and Newcastle target outshines Erling Haaland with 'monumental' Champions League heroics
arts.sum: He was imperious both in attack and defence...
